zh.lifeSummary: Peter Menges Sr.是Peter Mangus (Menges, Mengotus)和Catharina Baeder的兒子，於1581年出生在德國賀瑟奧登瓦爾德可萊斯莫斯奧塔爾希爾特斯可林根。他於大約1596年與Anna Margaretha Staub在德國賀瑟奧登瓦爾德可萊斯莫斯奧塔爾希爾特斯可林根結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1662年9月2日在德國賀瑟奧登瓦爾德可萊斯莫斯奧塔爾希爾特斯可林根享年81歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Peter Menges Sr.是Peter Mangus (Menges, Mengotus)和Catharina Baeder的儿子，于1581年出生在德国賀瑟奧登瓦爾德可萊斯莫斯奧塔爾希爾特斯可林根。他于大约1596年与Anna Margaretha Staub在德国賀瑟奧登瓦爾德可萊斯莫斯奧塔爾希爾特斯可林根结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1662年9月2日在德国賀瑟奧登瓦爾德可萊斯莫斯奧塔爾希爾特斯可林根享年81岁。

nameMeanings.name: Menges
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: from an altered form of the personal name   Magnus  .
German: from the personal name Me(i)ngoss, from ancient Germanic magin ‘strength, might’ + gōt ‘Goth’.
In some cases also an Americanized form of Hungarian Mengesz, a surname of German origin (see above).

variants.name: Manges
meanings: Probably Scottish: variant of Menzies , of which the traditional pronunciation is Mingies.

variants.name: Magnus
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Gerhard, Bernd, Egon, Erwin, Kurt, Otto, Reinhard, Volker, Wilhelm, Wolfgang.

German, Flemish, and Walloon: from the personal name Magnus, which is from the Latin adjective magnus ‘great’ or a Latinized form of a short form of ancient Germanic compound names based on the element magan ‘strength, might’. The name was borne by several early Christian saints, including St. Magnus (8th century), a monk in St. Gallen in Switzerland and missionary in Allgäu in southern Germany, whose real name was Magnoald. This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine). In Belgium, it may also be a Latinized (humanistic) form of Walloon Legrand .

English, Scottish, Swedish, Danish, Norwegian, and North German: from the Scandinavian personal name Magnus, borne by Magnus the Good (died 1047), king of Norway and Denmark, who was named for the Emperor Charlemagne, Latin Carolus Magnus ‘Charles the Great’, under the impression that Magnus was a personal name. The name spread from Norway to the eastern Scandinavian royal houses, and became popular all over Scandinavia and thence in the English Danelaw. It has also been adopted as a Jewish name.

nameMeanings.name: Peter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: Peter Menges Sr. was born in 1581, in Hiltersklingen, Mossautal, Odenwaldkreis, Hesse, Germany as the son of Peter Mangus (Menges, Mengotus) and Catharina Baeder. He married Anna Margaretha Staub about 1596, in Hiltersklingen, Mossautal, Odenwaldkreis, Hesse, Germany. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 2 September 1662, in Hiltersklingen, Mossautal, Odenwaldkreis, Hesse, Germany, at the age of 81.

fr.lifeSummary: Peter Menges Sr. est né en 1581, à Hiltersklingen, Mossautal, Odenwaldkreis, Hessen, Allemagne, fils de Peter Mangus (Menges, Mengotus) et Catharina Baeder. Il a épousé Anna Margaretha Staub environ 1596, à Hiltersklingen, Mossautal, Odenwaldkreis, Hessen, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 2 septembre 1662, à Hiltersklingen, Mossautal, Odenwaldkreis, Hessen, Allemagne, à l’âge de 81 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Peter Menges Sr. wurde 1581 in Hiltersklingen, Mossautal, Odenwaldkreis, Hessen, Deutschland, als Sohn von Peter Mangus (Menges, Mengotus) und Catharina Baeder geboren. Er hat um 1596 in Hiltersklingen, Mossautal, Odenwaldkreis, Hessen, Deutschland Anna Margaretha Staub geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 2. September 1662 im Alter von 81 Jahren in Hiltersklingen, Mossautal, Odenwaldkreis, Hessen, Deutschland.

it.lifeSummary: Peter Menges Sr. è nato il nel 1581 nel Hiltersklingen, Mossautal, Odenwaldkreis, Hessen, Germania come figlio di Peter Mangus (Menges, Mengotus) e Catharina Baeder. Lui sposato Anna Margaretha Staub circa 1596, nel Hiltersklingen, Mossautal, Odenwaldkreis, Hessen, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 2 settembre 1662, nel Hiltersklingen, Mossautal, Odenwaldkreis, Hessen, Germania, all'età di 81 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Peter Menges Sr.は1581年にドイツヘセンオデンワルドクレイスモッサウタルヒルテルスクリンジェンでPeter Mangus (Menges, Mengotus)とCatharina Baederの息子として生まれた。約1596年にドイツヘセンオデンワルドクレイスモッサウタルヒルテルスクリンジェンでAnna Margaretha Staubと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1662年9月2日にドイツヘセンオデンワルドクレイスモッサウタルヒルテルスクリンジェンで81歳で死去した。

ko.Of Hiltersklingen,Starkenburg,Hessen,Ger: 데우츠체스 라이치 그로ss헤어즈그투 헤센 크레이스 르바치 힐터스클링
ko.lifeSummary: Peter Menges Sr.(은)는 1581년 독일 헤센 오데월드크레이스 모소탤 힐터스클링에서 Peter Mangus (Menges, Mengotus)(와)과 Catharina Baeder의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1596년 독일 헤센 오데월드크레이스 모소탤 힐터스클링에서 Anna Margaretha Staub(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1662년 9월 2일 독일 헤센 오데월드크레이스 모소탤 힐터스클링에서 81세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Peter Menges Sr. nasceu em 1581, em Hiltersklingen, Mossautal, Odenwaldkreis, Hessen, Alemanha filho de Peter Mangus (Menges, Mengotus) e Catharina Baeder. Ele casou-se com Anna Margaretha Staub aproximadamente 1596, em Hiltersklingen, Mossautal, Odenwaldkreis, Hessen, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 2 de setembro de 1662, em Hiltersklingen, Mossautal, Odenwaldkreis, Hessen, Alemanha, com 81 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Peter Menges Sr. родился в 1581 г. в местности хилтирсклинген, моссауталь, оденвалдкрис, Гессен, Германия. Его родителей звали Peter Mangus (Menges, Mengotus) и Catharina Baeder. Он женился на женщине по имени Anna Margaretha Staub около 1596 г. в местности хилтирсклинген, моссауталь, оденвалдкрис, Гессен, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер 2 сентября 1662 г. в местности хилтирсклинген, моссауталь, оденвалдкрис, Гессен, Германия в возрасте 81 год.

es.lifeSummary: Peter Menges Sr. nació en 1581, en Hiltersklingen, Mossautal, Odenwaldkreis, Hessen, Alemania como hijo de Peter Mangus (Menges, Mengotus) y Catharina Baeder. Se casó con Anna Margaretha Staub aproximadamente 1596, en Hiltersklingen, Mossautal, Odenwaldkreis, Hessen, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 2 de septiembre de 1662, en Hiltersklingen, Mossautal, Odenwaldkreis, Hessen, Alemania, a la edad de 81 años.
